final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign with a complex but well-organized visual composition.

Style/medium: needs a bold, graphic-design-forward promotional aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography stacking with artistic lettering; must have a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring some of the type layers
Subject: must include a hero product or brand subject as the main focal element that overlaps the text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve: (1) artistic/decorative lettering treatment, (2) typographic stacking with multiple text layers at varying scales, (3) product/subject overlapping type to create depth, (4) complex but visually organized composition — not chaotic
Avoid: must avoid flat, sparse, or minimalist layouts; must avoid cluttered chaos where hierarchy is lost
